pr.title: Add user lookup endpoint
pr.description: Looks up a user by id.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+def get_user(conn, user_id):
+    query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = '%s'" % user_id
+    return conn.execute(query).fetchone()
+

planted_defects.description: SQL injection: user_id is interpolated directly into the SQL string via % formatting instead of using a parameterized query.
